overall.description: A third-person perspective follows an armored character with a red helmet walking through a desolate snowy mountain landscape at night. The scene features dramatic low-light atmosphere with a flashlight illuminating the path ahead, scattered rocky outcrops, and crystalline formations across the terrain, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic blue-toned lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with distant mountain peak

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward the large mountain ahead, flashlight illuminating the path

entered.detail: massive snow-covered mountain dominating the background with visible ridges
expansive snow field with footprints and uneven drifts
dark rock formation partially buried in snow
tall dark crystalline spikes protruding from the snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy valley at night, following an armored character walking toward a massive mountain peak in the distance. The terrain is desolate and empty, with scattered rocky outcrops and crystalline formations visible on the periphery, while the character's flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate the snow-covered ground ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view above snowy terrain

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the dark cloudy night sky, then tilts back down to forward facing

agents.ego_description: briefly looks up at the sky while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: overcast night sky with heavy cloud cover blocking stars

segments.scene_description: The camera briefly tilts upward to show the dark overcast sky above, momentarily losing sight of the mountain and ground terrain, before returning to the forward-facing walking perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy slope with scattered boulders and crystalline spikes

agents.ego_description: navigating through the snow around scattered rocks and crystalline formations

entered.detail: cluster of dark jagged crystal formations rising from the snow
medium-sized rocks partially buried in snow drifts

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the snowy landscape, the character weaves around scattered boulders and crystalline spikes that dot the terrain. The mountain peak shifts to the left of the frame as the character advances, with the flashlight revealing texture in the snow-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain approach with dense boulder fields

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the mountain base, flashlight beam sweeping across larger rock formations

entered.detail: large boulder field with rocks the size of vehicles
dense grouping of dark crystal spires

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes more rugged as the character ascends toward the mountain base, passing massive rock formations and dense crystalline clusters. The boulders grow larger and more prominent in the foreground, while the mountain peak returns to the center of the frame as the character approaches the steeper slope.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy valley that gradually transitions into a rugged ascent toward a massive mountain peak. It begins by following an armored character across an empty expanse, where a flashlight cuts through the night to illuminate scattered rocky outcrops and crystalline formations. As the camera briefly tilts upward toward the dark overcast sky, it momentarily loses sight of the terrain before returning to a forward-facing perspective. The scene then shifts as the character weaves around boulders and crystalline spikes, causing the distant peak to drift to the left of the frame. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged with larger rock formations and dense crystalline clusters as the camera ascends toward the mountain base, bringing the peak back to the center of the frame.
